style_effects: Gentle blue water droplets cling to Geodude's surface, shimmering with soft luminescence as they slowly drift upward. A serene aura of cool aquamarine light radiates from its pores, forming delicate, rippling waves that pulse gently around its body. The lighting mood is calm and refreshing, with a soft blue-white glow reminiscent of deep ocean currents, casting subtle ripples across the scene. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
